versions.version_description: All parts included, corrected and timed chords.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Intro]

[ch]A#m[/ch] [ch]D#m[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch] [ch]A#m[/ch]
[ch]A#m[/ch] [ch]D#m[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch] [ch]A#m[/ch]
[ch]F#[/ch] [ch]A#m[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch]

[Chorus]
[ch]F#[/ch] [ch]G#[/ch] [ch]Fm[/ch] [ch]F#[/ch]

Artist: Sia Furler
Song: Chandelier
Tab: Kate

Brand new Sia song, I learned it hastily so, I hope this is accurate!

[Verse 1]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]
Party girls don't get hurt[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D#m[/ch]
Can't feel anything, when will I learn[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]              [ch]A#m[/ch]
I push it down, push it down[/tab]

[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]
I'm the one "for a good time call"[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D#m[/ch]
Phone's blowin' up, they're ringin' my doorbell[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]              [ch]A#m[/ch]
I feel the love, feel the love[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
1,2,3 1,2,3 drink[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]
1,2,3 1,2,3 drink[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch] (sustain/hold)
1,2,3 1,2,3 drink[/tab]
[tab](sustained/held [ch]G#[/ch])
Throw em back, till I lose count[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]      [ch]G#[/ch]          [ch]Fm[/ch]         [ch]F#[/ch]
I'm gonna swing from the chandelier, from the chandelier[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]      [ch]G#[/ch]          [ch]Fm[/ch]         [ch]F#[/ch]
I'm gonna live like tomorrow doesn't exist, like it doesn't exist[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]      [ch]G#[/ch]          [ch]Fm[/ch]         [ch]F#[/ch]
I'm gonna fly like a bird through the night, feel my tears as they dry[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]      [ch]G#[/ch]            [ch]Fm[/ch]                   [ch]F#[/ch]
I'm gonna swing from the chandelier, from the chandelier[/tab]

[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                              [ch]G#[/ch]             
And I'm holding on for dear life, won't look down won't open my eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                               [ch]F#[/ch]
Keep my glass full until morning light, 'cause I'm just holding on for tonight[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                              [ch]G#[/ch]
Help me, I'm holding on for dear life, won't look down won't open my eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                               [ch]F#[/ch]
Keep my glass full until morning light, 'cause I'm just holding on for tonight[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
On for tonight[/tab]

[Verse 2]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]
Sun is up, I'm a mess[/tab]
[tab]         [ch]D#m[/ch]
Gotta get out now, gotta run from this[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch]              [ch]A#m[/ch]
Here comes the shame, here comes the shame[/tab]

[Pre-Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
1,2,3 1,2,3 drink[/tab]
[tab][ch]A#m[/ch]
1,2,3 1,2,3 drink[/tab]
[tab][ch]G#[/ch] (sustain/hold)
1,2,3 1,2,3 drink[/tab]
[tab](sustained/held [ch]G#[/ch])
Throw em back, till I lose count[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]      [ch]G#[/ch]          [ch]Fm[/ch]         [ch]F#[/ch]
I'm gonna swing from the chandelier, from the chandelier[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]      [ch]G#[/ch]          [ch]Fm[/ch]         [ch]F#[/ch]
I'm gonna live like tomorrow doesn't exist, like it doesn't exist[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]      [ch]G#[/ch]          [ch]Fm[/ch]         [ch]F#[/ch]
I'm gonna fly like a bird through the night, feel my tears as they dry[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]      [ch]G#[/ch]          [ch]Fm[/ch]         [ch]F#[/ch]
I'm gonna swing from the chandelier, from the chandelier[/tab]

[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                              [ch]G#[/ch]             
And I'm holding on for dear life, won't look down won't open my eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                               [ch]F#[/ch]
Keep my glass full until morning light, 'cause I'm just holding on for tonight[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]                              [ch]G#[/ch]             
Help me, I'm holding on for dear life, won't look down won't open my eyes[/tab]
[tab][ch]Fm[/ch]                               [ch]F#[/ch]
Keep my glass full until morning light, 'cause I'm just holding on for tonight[/tab]
[tab][ch]F#[/ch]
On for tonight[/tab]
